title: ex01
text: The following content is provided under a Creative Commons license. Your support will help MIT OpenCourseWare continue to offer high quality educational resources for free. To make a donation or view additional materials from hundreds of MIT courses, visit MIT OpenCourseWare at ocw.mit.edu. So which of the following is a good and valid definition for class representing a car? Most of the people I think have gotten it, which is the red, which says class car object. That's perfect. So this defines a function. This defines a class correctly, but A is just not descriptive name at all. And this is kind of weird. And this is the right one here.
